name: Flint
long_description:
Flint is an AI-powered personalized learning platform for K-12 schools, helping teachers deliver individualized instruction at scale. Trusted by 500,000+ educators and students, Flint has powered learning activities that increase student engagement, academic performance, and collaboration.

Through AI-driven tutoring, real-time feedback, and interactive learning experiences, Flint enables every student to receive personalized support without adding to teacher workload.

With AI-native student analytics, educators gain full visibility into student progress, strengths, and areas for improvement, while saving time on grading, lesson planning, and differentiation. Students receive a 24/7 AI tutor that adapts to their level without giving away answers, supporting deeper understanding and independent thinking.

For schools and districts, Flint provides robust AI guardrails, including customizable moderation, grade-level controls, and full transparency into student usage, ensuring safe and responsible AI adoption.
